description: FlashAttention ROCm Triton backend experiment for the local gfx1151 stack
divergence_notes: Uses the ROCm FlashAttention main_perf branch because the documented Triton AMD backend path lives there.
Builds the pure Python Triton AMD lane with FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_ENABLE=TRUE and FLASH_ATTENTION_SKIP_CUDA_BUILD=TRUE.
Uses repo-owned python-amd-aiter-gfx1151, python-triton-gfx1151, and python-pytorch-opt-rocm-gfx1151 instead of letting setup.py install bundled or PyPI runtime pieces.
update_notes: Recheck the ROCm FlashAttention main_perf branch and CK-tile tags before bumping this package.
Keep direct flash_attn Triton AMD build/import smoke as the first validation gate before any vLLM integration scenario.
Treat FLASH_ATTENTION_TRITON_AMD_AUTOTUNE=TRUE as a performance follow-up, not part of the initial correctness gate.
